title: coleus harmandii
intro: Coleus harmandii, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus scutellarioides, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly used in traditional medicine due to its aromatic properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health issues. Coleus harmandii is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
